notes.text: Nathan's fitness system: VR cardio Mon/Wed/Fri (3 sessions/day, ~250 cal each, target 750-1000 cal/day), bodyweight Tue/Thu at 10am. Intermittent fasting: no food before lunch. Carnivore-leaning diet.
Cron reminders active: VR nudges at 10am/1pm/3pm Mon/Wed/Fri; bodyweight nudge at 10am Tue/Thu — posting to #sage on Discord.
